title: Velvety Buttery Steak Stir-fry
description: A dairy-free indulgent Norwegian dish featuring a fillet of steak cooked to perfection and served with a velvety buttery sauce.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and onion, sauté for about 2 minutes until fragrant but not browned.
Deglaze the pan with soy sauce. Stir to combine evenly.
Reduce heat to low and sprinkle cornstarch over the sauce, stirring constantly to avoid lumps.
Place steak on top of the sauce in the wok, letting it cook undisturbed for about 2 minutes each side or until desired doneness is achieved.
Taste and adjust seasoning as needed. Serve hot with steamed vegetables if desired.
